title: AD-14 Phase 14: Automated validation and MVP readiness

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 1.0 Stabilizacja MVP
milestone.description: Hardening, dokumentacja, quality gates, wydajność i gotowość do pierwszego użycia produkcyjnego.

body:
## Objective
Establish quality gates, E2E tests for a vertical slice, and prepare for code review.

## Scope
- Typecheck, lint, unit tests for renderer/main/preload/services/runtime
- Integration tests: IPC, Workspace Service, Model Gateway, MCP mock, SQLite, Extension Host
- E2E tests: open `.code-workspace` -> Explorer -> Monaco -> chat -> model mock -> file tool -> patch -> diff
- A11y tests: workbench, chat, approvals, settings, MCP Manager, extension view
- Architectural tests: dependency-cruiser, no cycles, no imports from `internal`

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Typecheck, lint and unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] E2E vertical-slice tests pass
- [ ] A11y tests pass
- [ ] Architectural tests are enforced
- [ ] Coverage report: Permission Broker, Tool Router, Model Gateway, MCP Manager, Memory Service, Extension Host
- [ ] Limitations that cannot be automatically verified are documented

## Milestone
1.0 Stabilize MVP

title: AD-13 Phase 13: Settings, secrets, docs and MVP hardening

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 1.0 Stabilizacja MVP
milestone.description: Hardening, dokumentacja, quality gates, wydajność i gotowość do pierwszego użycia produkcyjnego.

body:
## Objective
Implement a Settings Service, secure secrets handling, MVP documentation and hardening.

## Scope
- Settings Service: user/workspace scope, secrets in secure storage
- UI Settings: JSON fallback, schema validation
- Documentation: architecture, security model, running instructions, compatibility matrix
- MVP limitations: no full Windows sandbox, not full VS Code API compatibility

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Settings Service separates scopes and secrets
- [ ] Secrets are stored in secure storage or in environment variables `${env:VAR_NAME}`
- [ ] UI Settings provide a JSON fallback and validation
- [ ] README describes AgentDeck as its own IDE (not an official MS distribution)
- [ ] Security documentation covers IPC, deny-first, sensitive paths, and secure storage
- [ ] MVP limitations are documented

## Milestone
1.0 Stabilize MVP

title: AD-12 Phase 12: Terminal, Problems, Output, Testing, Debug and LSP bridge

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.3.x Extension Host i kompatybilność
milestone.description: VSIX Installer, Extension Host z vscode shim, LSP bridge, terminal, testy i smoke priorytetowych rozszerzeń.

body:
## Objective
Provide minimal IDE services required by priority extensions.

## Scope
- Problems panel: diagnostics from LSP/extensions, navigation to Monaco
- Output channels: service/extension logs, filtering
- Terminal Service: Windows profiles, log redaction
- Testing API: test tree, run profiles, results
- Debug Service: minimal launch/stop (PowerShell)
- LSP bridge: stdio transport, process spawn

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Problems panel displays diagnostics and navigates to Monaco
- [ ] Output channels support source filtering
- [ ] Terminal runs basic Windows profiles
- [ ] Testing API supports test tree and run profiles
- [ ] Debug launch/stop works for PowerShell
- [ ] Smoke tests: SonarQube, GitHub Actions, Playwright Test, PowerShell

## Milestone
0.3.x Extension Host and compatibility

title: AD-11 Phase 11: Extension Host, VSIX Installer and extension compatibility

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.3.x Extension Host i kompatybilność
milestone.description: VSIX Installer, Extension Host z vscode shim, LSP bridge, terminal, testy i smoke priorytetowych rozszerzeń.

body:
## Objective
Support installing extensions from a folder and VSIX, provide a minimal `vscode` shim, and maintain a compatibility matrix.

## Scope
- Parse manifests: `package.json`, `engines.vscode`, contribution points
- VSIX Installer: validation, unpack, local install
- `vscode` shim: commands, configuration, views, menus, languages, diagnostics, testing, debug
- Compatibility matrix: SonarQube, GitHub Actions, Playwright Test, PowerShell, Context7 MCP, PDF Utilities MCP

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Load extension from a folder and from a `.vsix`
- [ ] Installer validates manifest, size and structure
- [ ] Invalid VSIX does not leave a partial installation behind
- [ ] Supported contribution points for the MVP are implemented
- [ ] Unsupported APIs return a controlled error

## Milestone
0.3.x Extension Host and compatibility

title: AD-10 Phase 10: MCP Manager

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.2.x Agent Runtime i MCP
milestone.description: Sesje agentowe, workerzy, sub-agenci, event log, pamięć, retrieval i MCP Manager (stdio/http, trust, tools).

body:
## Objective
Manage `mcp.json`, the lifecycle of stdio/http servers, trust decisions and routing of tools/resources/prompts.

## Scope
- MCP configuration: user/workspace scope, `mcp.json`
- Lifecycle states: disabled, needs trust, starting, running, failed, stopped
- Trust decision per workspace/user
- Tools/resources/prompts routing via Tool Router and Permission Broker
- Handling timeouts, invalid responses and protocol negotiation failures

## Definition of Done
- [ ] MCP Manager detects user and workspace configurations
- [ ] Servers expose a full set of lifecycle statuses
- [ ] Starting a workspace server requires trust approval
- [ ] Each MCP tool call goes through the Permission Broker
- [ ] Integration tests with mock MCP servers (stdio + HTTP)

title: AD-9 Phase 9: Memory Service and Code Indexer

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.2.x Agent Runtime i MCP
milestone.description: Sesje agentowe, workerzy, sub-agenci, event log, pamięć, retrieval i MCP Manager (stdio/http, trust, tools).

body:
## Objective
Provide local memory (Markdown + SQLite/sqlite-vec) and semantic code retrieval.

## Scope
- SQLite schema: event log, patches, sessions, memories, embeddings, migrations
- `sqlite-vec` for embeddings with model metadata
- File-based memory: `MemoryEntry` pointing to a Markdown file, scope, checksum
- Tree-sitter chunking: TS/JS/JSON/YAML/Markdown/PowerShell
- RetrievalQuery: filters for scope, language, folder, freshness

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Versioned SQLite schema with migrations
- [ ] Append-only event log with secret redaction
- [ ] `sqlite-vec` stores embeddings with metadata
- [ ] Agent suggests memory changes as a patch (not silent write)
- [ ] Index is rebuildable deterministically

## Milestone
0.2.x Agent Runtime and MCP

title: AD-8 Phase 8: Agent Runtime, workers and subagents

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.2.x Agent Runtime i MCP
milestone.description: Sesje agentowe, workerzy, sub-agenci, event log, pamięć, retrieval i MCP Manager (stdio/http, trust, tools).

body:
## Objective
Implement a Session Broker with isolated workers, subagents, and task activity tracking.

## Scope
- Session Broker: `AgentSession` per `ChatTab`, isolated context
- Worker lifecycle: start/stop, retry, cancellation, crash recovery
- Subagents: separate tasks with limited context that return a summary to the parent
- Task Activity: status, tools used, result

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Each `ChatTab` has its own session, model, agent, and event log
- [ ] Worker stops gracefully without killing the runtime
- [ ] Worker crashes are reported in the UI with an option to resume
- [ ] Subagent returns a summary rather than full history
- [ ] Permission Broker distinguishes parent and subagent scopes

## Milestone
0.2.x Agent Runtime and MCP

title: AD-7 Phase 7: Tool Router, file tool, patch model and Permission Broker

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.2.x Agent Runtime i MCP
milestone.description: Sesje agentowe, workerzy, sub-agenci, event log, pamięć, retrieval i MCP Manager (stdio/http, trust, tools).

body:
## Objective
Provide file tools for the first slice with a deny-first approval flow and a Conflict Broker.

## Scope
- Read-only tools: read file, search (with size/scope limits)
- Mutating tool `applyPatch` with an approval workflow
- PatchSet: base hash, operations, author, risk level
- Conflict Broker: auto-merge non-conflicting changes, review gate for conflicts
- Sensitive files: separate high-risk approval path

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Read-only tools expose explicit limits
- [ ] `applyPatch` requires approval before applying
- [ ] A patch conflicting with the current file version creates a `Conflict`
- [ ] Diff is visible in the UI and linked to the event log
- [ ] Delete/rename/binary/high-risk operations require an additional explicit decision

## Milestone
0.2.x Agent Runtime and MCP

title: AD-6 Phase 6: Model Gateway and first chat vertical slice

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.2.x Agent Runtime i MCP
milestone.description: Sesje agentowe, workerzy, sub-agenci, event log, pamięć, retrieval i MCP Manager (stdio/http, trust, tools).

body:
## Objective
Define a provider contract for LLM providers and implement a minimal chat tab that invokes a model.

## Scope
- Provider contract: model list, health check, streaming, tool calling, context window
- Adapters: OpenRouter, Ollama, LM Studio, generic OpenAI-compatible adapter
- Chat tab: model selection, message sending, streaming, stop/cancel
- Event log: user message, model metadata, streaming chunks, final response

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Provider contract is normalized across adapters
- [ ] Chat tab supports model selection and message sending
- [ ] Streaming responses without blocking the UI
- [ ] Stop/cancel interrupts the request
- [ ] Event log records session entries without secrets

## Milestone
0.2.x Agent Runtime and MCP

title: AD-5 Phase 5: Identity Service and GitHub login

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.1.x Bootstrap MVP
milestone.description: Fundament projektu: Electron shell, React workbench, Monaco, Workspace Service i pierwszy pionowy slice (code-workspace -> Explorer -> Editor -> Chat -> Model -> File tool).

body:
## Objective
Implement GitHub login via OAuth (system browser + loopback callback) with secure token storage.

## Scope
- GitHub OAuth: system browser + loopback callback, with Device Flow fallback
- Secure token storage (OS-level)
- User profile, status bar, Settings integration
- Logout, token revocation, minimal scopes

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Login opens the system browser and validates state and callback
- [ ] Device Flow fallback works without a callback port
- [ ] Tokens are stored in secure storage and never in renderer localStorage
- [ ] Status bar shows login state
- [ ] Logout removes tokens and clears the UI session

## Milestone
0.1.x Bootstrap MVP

title: AD-4 Phase 4: Editor Service with Monaco

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.1.x Bootstrap MVP
milestone.description: Fundament projektu: Electron shell, React workbench, Monaco, Workspace Service i pierwszy pionowy slice (code-workspace -> Explorer -> Editor -> Chat -> Model -> File tool).

body:
## Objective
Integrate Monaco Editor as the text editor with tabs, dirty state, and basic language features.

## Scope
- Monaco: tabs, dirty state, save, reload conflict, split view
- Syntax highlighting for TS/JS/JSON/YAML/Markdown/PowerShell
- Integration with Problems/Diagnostics
- Editor API: open, reveal, applyWorkspaceEdit, showDiff

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Opening a file creates an editor tab
- [ ] Dirty state and save are handled via the Workspace Service
- [ ] External file changes produce reload conflicts
- [ ] Split view supports at least 2 columns
- [ ] Problems panel navigates to Monaco

## Milestone
0.1.x Bootstrap MVP

title: AD-3 Phase 3: Workspace Service, Explorer and Search

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.1.x Bootstrap MVP
milestone.description: Fundament projektu: Electron shell, React workbench, Monaco, Workspace Service i pierwszy pionowy slice (code-workspace -> Explorer -> Editor -> Chat -> Model -> File tool).

body:
## Objective
Implement a workspace service with `.code-workspace` parsing, a file tree explorer, and search functionality.

## Scope
- `.code-workspace` parser (JSONC, relative paths, multi-root)
- Explorer: tree view, refresh, reveal in explorer, context menu
- Search: text search, glob include/exclude, results list
- Mark sensitive paths for the Permission Broker

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Workspace Service parses `.code-workspace` with `folders`, `settings`, `extensions`
- [ ] Explorer displays multi-root and reacts to filesystem changes
- [ ] Search returns results with filename, line, and snippet
- [ ] Sensitive paths are flagged and excluded from the model context

## Milestone
0.1.x Bootstrap MVP

title: AD-2 Phase 2: Workbench shell and default dark theme

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.1.x Bootstrap MVP
milestone.description: Fundament projektu: Electron shell, React workbench, Monaco, Workspace Service i pierwszy pionowy slice (code-workspace -> Explorer -> Editor -> Chat -> Model -> File tool).

body:
## Objective
Build the primary UI layout inspired by VS Code with a default dark theme.

## Scope
- Layout: activity bar, side bar, editor area, bottom panel, status bar
- Design token system (CSS variables)
- Dark theme baseline meeting WCAG 2.1 AA contrast
- Settings Service for theme persistence

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Initial screen is a functional workbench with an option to open a `.code-workspace`
- [ ] Layout is stable (no dimension shifts on hover/loading/error)
- [ ] UI regions have semantic roles and are keyboard accessible
- [ ] Dark theme is the default and meets WCAG 2.1 AA contrast requirements
- [ ] No flash of light theme on startup

## Milestone
0.1.x Bootstrap MVP

title: AD-1 Phase 1: Project foundation and domain contract

labels.name: roadmap
labels.description: Temat roadmapy lub większego kierunku prac.

milestone.title: 0.1.x Bootstrap MVP
milestone.description: Fundament projektu: Electron shell, React workbench, Monaco, Workspace Service i pierwszy pionowy slice (code-workspace -> Explorer -> Editor -> Chat -> Model -> File tool).

body:
## Objective
Create the Electron/React/TypeScript application skeleton and the MVP domain contract.

## Scope
- Application skeleton: Electron main + React renderer + TypeScript (strict)
- Domain contract: `ChatTab`, `AgentDefinition`, `Worker`, `AgentTask`, `PatchSet`, `Conflict`, `MemoryEntry`, `RetrievalQuery`, `McpServerProfile`, `ExtensionManifest`, `IdentitySession`
- Architectural tests (dependency-cruiser)
- Scripts: dev start, typecheck, lint, unit tests

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Project contains directories: `apps/desktop`, `packages/workbench`, `packages/services`, `packages/agent-runtime`, `packages/shared`
- [ ] TypeScript `strict` enabled; configuration separates main/renderer/preload/tests/build
- [ ] Renderer has no direct access to Node APIs except via preload IPC
- [ ] Application launches an empty window with a dark background
- [ ] `docs/domain.md` contains the domain model
- [ ] Architectural tests prevent cycles and imports from `internal`

## Milestone
0.1.x Bootstrap MVP
